attachment.content:
- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.
- skill-creator: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, edit, or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, benchmark skill performance with variance analysis, or optimize a skill's description for better triggering accuracy.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

# React + Vite

This template provides a minimal setup to get React working in Vite with HMR and some ESLint rules.

Currently, two official plugins are available:

- [@vitejs/plugin-react](https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-react/blob/main/packages/plugin-react) uses [Oxc](https://oxc.rs)
- [@vitejs/plugin-react-swc](https://github.com/vitejs/vite-plugin-react/blob/main/packages/plugin-react-swc) uses [SWC](https://swc.rs/)

## React Compiler

The React Compiler is not enabled on this template because of its impact on dev & build performances. To add it, see [this documentation](https://react.dev/learn/react-compiler/installation).

## Expanding the ESLint configuration

If you are developing a production application, we recommend using TypeScript with type-aware lint rules enabled. Check out the [TS template](https://github.com/vitejs/vite/tree/main/packages/create-vite/template-react-ts) for information on how to integrate TypeScript and [`typescript-eslint`](https://typescript-eslint.io) in your project.

content.text:
项目已搭建好，下面是整体情况：

---

## 飞书机器人项目结构

```
feishu-bot/
├── .env                    # 飞书 App ID + Secret（已写入，不会被 git 提交）
├── package.json
├── src/
│   ├── index.js            # CLI 入口
│   ├── feishu/
│   │   ├── client.js       # 飞书 SDK 客户端（自动管理 access token）
│   │   ├── message.js      # 发送文本/图片/文件/卡片消息
│   │   ├── media.js        # 上传图片/文件到飞书
│   │   └── doc.js          # 创建飞书文档、多维表格
│   └── commands/
│       ├── doc.js           # 文档生成（会议纪要/技术文档/项目方案模板）
│       └── diagram.js       # 图表生成（流程图/时序图/类图/甘特图/饼图/ER图）
```

## 已实现的功能

| 功能 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| **发送消息** | 文本消息发送到指定群聊 |
| **创建飞书文档** | 生成结构化文档并同步到飞书（含 3 种模板）|
| **生成图表** | Mermaid 图表渲染为图片，上传到飞书群或插入文档（含 6 种类型）|

## CLI 用法

```bash
# 发送消息到群
node src/index.js send <群的chat_id> "消息内容"

# 生成飞书文档（自动创建文档 + 写入内容）
node src/index.js doc meeting "周会纪要" --chat <chat_id>
node src/index.js doc tech "API 设计文档" --chat <chat_id>
node src/index.js doc project "项目方案" --chat <chat_id>

# 生成图表图片（发到群 + 可选创建文档）
node src/index.js diagram flowchart "登录流程" --chat <chat_id> --doc
node src/index.js diagram sequence "API调用时序" --chat <chat_id>
```

## 下一步你需要做的

要发消息，你需要一个 **群聊的 chat_id**。获取方式：
1. 把机器人拉到群里
2. 在飞书开发者后台 → 事件订阅 → 添加「接收消息」事件
3. 在群里 @机器人 发一条消息，从回调中获取 chat_id

或者你也可以先把机器人拉到一个群里，然后告诉我群名，我帮你写一个查询群列表的脚本来拿到 chat_id。

需要我现在帮你做这个查询群列表的功能吗？

message.content: 我要怎么把机器人拉入群

content.thinking:
The user is asking how to add their Feishu bot to a group chat. Let me tell them the steps.

In Feishu, there are a few ways to add a bot to a group chat:

1. In the group chat, click on settings → add members → search for the bot's name and add it
2. Or use the Feishu API to add the bot to a chat (but this requires chat_id first)

Let me give them clear instructions.

content.text:
在飞书中把机器人拉到群里很简单：

1. 打开你要拉机器人的**飞书群聊**
2. 点击右上角的 **群设置**（齿轮图标）
3. 点击 **群成员** → **添加成员**
4. 搜索你的**机器人名称**（你在飞书开放平台创建应用时设置的应用名称）
5. 选中机器人，点击**确定**

拉进去之后，在群里 @机器人 发一条消息「测试」，然后运行下面这个命令，我帮你查出 chat_id：

content.content: File created successfully at: /Users/xiaozhi/claude code/feishu-bot/src/list-groups.js (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

content.thinking: Good, I created the script. Let me tell the user to run it after adding the bot to the group.

content.text:
把机器人拉进群后，运行：

```bash
cd "/Users/xiaozhi/claude code/feishu-bot"
node src/list-groups.js
```

它会列出机器人所在的所有群聊名称和对应的 `chat_id`。拿到 `chat_id` 后就可以用之前那些命令发消息了。

content: 我们在做飞书机器人集成，项目已建好。下一步：把机器人拉到飞书群里，然后运行 `node src/list-groups.js` 获取 chat_id，就能发消息了。 (disable recaps in /config)

content.thinking:
The user can't find their bot when searching in the group chat. This is a common issue. Let me think about the possible reasons:

1. The bot app might not have been published/activated yet - in Feishu, bots need to be published or at least have the "available to" scope set correctly
2. The bot might need to have the "add to group chat" capability enabled
3. The user might be searching with the wrong name

Let me check common solutions:
- In Feishu open platform, the app needs to be "published" or at least "internally available"
- The app's "availability" settings determine who can find and add the bot
- Sometimes bots can only be added via API or via a specific flow

Let me ask the user about their app's publish status and availability settings.

content.text:
搜不到通常是应用还没发布，或者可用范围没配好。帮我确认以下几点：

1. 打开 [飞书开放平台](https://open.feishu.cn/app)，进入你的应用
2. 左侧菜单 → **应用发布**（或「应用功能」→「机器人」）
3. 确认以下几点：

   - **机器人功能** 是否已开启？没开的话点开
   - **可用范围** 里你有没有把自己加进去？（建议先设成「所有人」方便测试）
   - 点击右上角 **「发布」** 按钮（选「内部发布」即可，不需要审核到应用商店）

发布完成后，再去群里搜索你的**应用名称**（不是 App ID，是你在开放平台填的中文名），应该就能搜到了。

你的应用名称是什么？目前发布状态是「未发布」还是「已发布」？

input.content:
import requests

APP_ID = "cli_a9775595ac799bb4"
APP_SECRET = "[REDACTED]"


def get_token():
    """获取 tenant access token"""
    url = "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/auth/v3/tenant_access_token/internal"
    resp = requests.post(url, json={
        "app_id": APP_ID,
        "app_secret": APP_SECRET,
    })
    data = resp.json()
    print(f"Token 响应: code={data.get('code')}")
    return data.get("tenant_access_token")


def list_chats(token):
    """列出机器人所在的所有群聊"""
    url = "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/im/v1/chats"
    params = {
        "page_size": 50,
        "user_id_type": "open_id",
    }
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"}

    all_chats = []
    page_token = None

    while True:
        if page_token:
            params["page_token"] = page_token
        resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers, params=params)
        data = resp.json()
        code = data.get("code")

        if code != 0:
            print(f"获取群列表失败: code={code}, msg={data.get('msg')}")
            return all_chats

        items = data.get("data", {}).get("items", [])
        all_chats.extend(items)

        has_more = data.get("data", {}).get("has_more", False)
        page_token = data.get("data", {}).get("page_token")

        if not has_more:
            break

    return all_chats


def main():
    token = get_token()
    if not token:
        print("获取 token 失败，请检查 App ID 和 App Secret")
        return

toolUseResult.content:
import requests

APP_ID = "cli_a9775595ac799bb4"
APP_SECRET = "[REDACTED]"


def get_token():
    """获取 tenant access token"""
    url = "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/auth/v3/tenant_access_token/internal"
    resp = requests.post(url, json={
        "app_id": APP_ID,
        "app_secret": APP_SECRET,
    })
    data = resp.json()
    print(f"Token 响应: code={data.get('code')}")
    return data.get("tenant_access_token")


def list_chats(token):
    """列出机器人所在的所有群聊"""
    url = "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/im/v1/chats"
    params = {
        "page_size": 50,
        "user_id_type": "open_id",
    }
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"}

    all_chats = []
    page_token = None

    while True:
        if page_token:
            params["page_token"] = page_token
        resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers, params=params)
        data = resp.json()
        code = data.get("code")

        if code != 0:
            print(f"获取群列表失败: code={code}, msg={data.get('msg')}")
            return all_chats

        items = data.get("data", {}).get("items", [])
        all_chats.extend(items)

        has_more = data.get("data", {}).get("has_more", False)
        page_token = data.get("data", {}).get("page_token")

        if not has_more:
            break

    return all_chats


def main():
    token = get_token()
    if not token:
        print("获取 token 失败，请检查 App ID 和 App Secret")
        return

    print(f"Token 获取成功\n")

    chats = list_chats(token)

    if not chats:
        print("未找到任何群聊。")
        print("可能原因：")
        print("  1. 机器人还没有被加入任何群")
        print("  2. 缺少权限，请去开放平台添加 im:chat 或 im:chat:readonly 权限并发布")
        return

    print(f"\n机器人共在 {len(chats)} 个群聊中:\n")
    for chat in chats:
        name = chat.get("name", "未命名群聊")
        chat_id = chat.get("chat_id", "无")
        print(f"  群名称: {name}")
        print(f"  chat_id: {chat_id}")
        print("  ---")

    # 保存到文件
    with open("chat_ids.txt", "w") as f:
        for chat in chats:
            f.write(f"{chat.get('name')}: {chat.get('chat_id')}\n")
    print(f"\n已保存到 chat_ids.txt")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
飞书消息轮询脚本 — 检查群里有没有新消息发给机器人
不需要 webhook，不需要部署，不需要公网 IP
"""
import requests
import json
import os
import time

APP_ID = "cli_a9775595ac799bb4"
APP_SECRET = "[REDACTED]"
CHAT_ID = "oc_77f9b2ffb922311b80e503c6573e74f0"


def get_token():
    resp = requests.post(
        "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/auth/v3/tenant_access_token/internal",
        json={"app_id": APP_ID, "app_secret": APP_SECRET},
    )
    return resp.json()["tenant_access_token"]


def list_recent_messages(token, chat_id, limit=10):
    """获取群聊最近的消息"""
    resp = requests.get(
        "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/im/v1/messages",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"},
        params={
            "receive_id_type": "chat_id",
            "receive_id": chat_id,
            "page_size": limit,
            "sort_type": "ByCreateTimeDesc",
        },
    )
    data = resp.json()
    if data.get("code") != 0:
        print(f"获取消息失败: code={data.get('code')}, msg={data.get('msg')}")
        return []
    return data.get("data", {}).get("items", [])


def send_message(token, chat_id, text):
    """发送消息到群"""
    resp = requests.post(
        "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/im/v1/messages?receive_id_type=chat_id",
        headers={
            "Authorization": f"Bearer {token}",
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
        },
        json={
            "receive_id": chat_id,
            "msg_type": "text",
            "content": json.dumps({"text": text}),
        },
    )
    return resp.json()


def main():
    token = get_token()
    print("Token 获取成功\n")

    msgs = list_recent_messages(token, CHAT_ID)
    if not msgs:
        print("没有获取到消息。可能需要添加 im:message:readonly 权限")
        print("去开放平台开通: https://open.feishu.cn/app/cli_a9775595ac799bb4/auth")
        return

    print(f"群聊最近 {len(msgs)} 条消息:\n")
    for msg in msgs:
        msg_type = msg.get("msg_type", "?")
        msg_id = msg.get("message_id", "")[:20]
        sender = msg.get("sender", {}).get("id", "?")
        body = msg.get("body", {})

        # 解析内容
        content = ""
        if msg_type == "text":
            content = body.get("content", "{}")
            try:
                content = json.loads(content).get("text", content)
            except:
                pass

        print(f"  [{msg_type}] {content[:80]}")
        print(f"    msg_id: {msg_id} | sender: {sender}")
        print()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
飞书消息轮询脚本 — 检查群里有没有新消息发给机器人
不需要 webhook，不需要部署，不需要公网 IP
"""
import requests
import json
import os
import time

APP_ID = "cli_a9775595ac799bb4"
APP_SECRET = "[REDACTED]"
CHAT_ID = "oc_77f9b2ffb922311b80e503c6573e74f0"


def get_token():
    resp = requests.post(
        "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/auth/v3/tenant_access_token/internal",
        json={"app_id": APP_ID, "app_secret": APP_SECRET},
    )
    return resp.json()["tenant_access_token"]


def list_recent_messages(token, chat_id, limit=10):
    """获取群聊最近的消息"""
    resp = requests.get(
        "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/im/v1/messages",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"},
        params={
            "receive_id_type": "chat_id",
            "receive_id": chat_id,
            "page_size": limit,
            "sort_type": "ByCreateTimeDesc",
        },
    )
    data = resp.json()
    if data.get("code") != 0:
        print(f"获取消息失败: code={data.get('code')}, msg={data.get('msg')}")
        return []
    return data.get("data", {}).get("items", [])


def send_message(token, chat_id, text):
    """发送消息到群"""
    resp = requests.post(
        "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/im/v1/messages?receive_id_type=chat_id",
        headers={
            "Authorization": f"Bearer {token}",
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
        },
        json={
            "receive_id": chat_id,
            "msg_type": "text",
            "content": json.dumps({"text": text}),
        },
    )
    return resp.json()


def main():
    token = get_token()
    print("Token 获取成功\n")

    msgs = list_recent_messages(token, CHAT_ID)
    if not msgs:
        print("没有获取到消息。可能需要添加 im:message:readonly 权限")
        print("去开放平台开通: https://open.feishu.cn/app/cli_a9775595ac799bb4/auth")
        return

    print(f"群聊最近 {len(msgs)} 条消息:\n")
    for msg in msgs:
        msg_type = msg.get("msg_type", "?")
        msg_id = msg.get("message_id", "")[:20]
        sender = msg.get("sender", {}).get("id", "?")
        body = msg.get("body", {})

        # 解析内容
        content = ""
        if msg_type == "text":
            content = body.get("content", "{}")
            try:
                content = json.loads(content).get("text", content)
            except:
                pass

        print(f"  [{msg_type}] {content[:80]}")
        print(f"    msg_id: {msg_id} | sender: {sender}")
        print()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
Claude Code ↔ 飞书 桥接工具
Claude Code 通过这个脚本读取飞书消息并回复
"""
import requests
import json
import sys
import os

APP_ID = "cli_a9775595ac799bb4"
APP_SECRET = "[REDACTED]"
CHAT_ID = "oc_77f9b2ffb922311b80e503c6573e74f0"
BASE = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
QUEUE_FILE = os.path.join(BASE, "..", "message_queue.json")

def get_token():
    resp = requests.post(
        "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/auth/v3/tenant_access_token/internal",
        json={"app_id": APP_ID, "app_secret": APP_SECRET},
    )
    return resp.json()["tenant_access_token"]

def send_msg(token, text):
    return requests.post(
        "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/im/v1/messages?receive_id_type=chat_id",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}", "Content-Type": "application/json"},
        json={"receive_id": CHAT_ID, "msg_type": "text",
              "content": json.dumps({"text": text}, ensure_ascii=False)},
    ).json()

def read_queue():
    if not os.path.exists(QUEUE_FILE):
        return []
    with open(QUEUE_FILE) as f:
        return json.load(f)

def clear_queue():
    with open(QUEUE_FILE, "w") as f:
        json.dump([], f)

def mark_processed(msg_id):
    queue = read_queue()
    for m in queue:
        if m["message_id"] == msg_id:
            m["processed"] = True
    with open(QUEUE_FILE, "w") as f:
        json.dump(queue, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)

# CLI
cmd = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "queue"

if cmd == "queue":
    # 查看待处理消息
    queue = read_queue()
    pending = [m for m in queue if not m.get("processed")]
    if not pending:
        print("(无待处理消息)")
    else:
        print(f"待处理消息 ({len(pending)} 条):\n")
        for m in pending:
            print(f"  [{m['message_id'][:12]}...] {m['text'][:100]}")
            print(f"    发送者: {m.get('sender','?')} | 时间: {m.get('time','?')}")
            print()

elif cmd == "reply":
    # 回复: python3 claude-bridge.py reply <回复内容>
    text = " ".join(sys.argv[2:])
    if not text:
        print("用法: python3 claude-bridge.py reply <回复内容>")
        sys.exit(1)
    token = get_token()
    result = send_msg(token, text)
    print("发送成功" if result.get("code") == 0 else f"失败: {result}")

elif cmd == "process":
    # 处理所有排队消息: python3 claude-bridge.py process
    queue = read_queue()
    pending = [m for m in queue if not m.get("processed")]
    if not pending:
        print("无待处理消息")
        sys.exit(0)
    print(f"共 {len(pending)} 条待处理消息待 Claude Code 处理")

elif cmd == "clear":
    clear_queue()
    print("队列已清空")

elif cmd == "done":
    # 标记某条消息已处理: python3 claude-bridge.py done <message_id>
    msg_id = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else None
    if msg_id:
        mark_processed(msg_id)
        print(f"已标记 {msg_id[:20]}... 为已处理")
    else:
        # 标记所有为已处理
        queue = read_queue()
        for m in queue:
            m["processed"] = True
        with open(QUEUE_FILE, "w") as f:
            json.dump(queue, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        print("全部标记为已处理")

else:
    print(f"未知命令: {cmd}")
    print("可用: queue | reply | process | clear | done")

Wait, let me re-read the polling script logic:
```python
for msg in msgs:
    if msg.get("message_id") == last_id:

```

This breaks when it finds the last_id. But the messages come in reverse chronological order (newest first). So if the last_id is an old system message, and the user sent a message AFTER the script started, the new message would appear BEFORE the last_id in the list. The break would happen AFTER seeing the new message.

Wait, no. If messages are sorted ByCreateTimeDesc (newest first):
- msg[0]: newest message (user's new message)
- msg[1]: second newest
- ...
- msg[N]: last_id (old system message)

The loop would:
1. msg[0] != last_id → add to new_msgs ✓
2. msg[1] != last_id → add to new_msgs
3. ...
4. msg[N] == last_id → break

This should work! Unless the page_size is too small and the user's message got pushed off the page.

Actually wait, the polling script uses `page_size=5`. If there have been more than 5 new messages, some might be missed. But the user only sent a few messages.

content.thinking:
The user is asking if they close the terminal (which would kill the polling script and the Claude Code session), will the conversation/bot still work.

The answer is: the polling script runs in the background as a child process. If they close the terminal, the background process will also be killed since it was started from this shell.

For the bot to work persistently, we need:
1. The polling script to run independently (e.g., as a launchd service, or using `nohup`/`screen`/`tmux`)
2. The Claude Code session - this is the main limitation. If the Claude Code session ends, even if polling continues, there's no AI to process messages.

The current architecture relies on Claude Code (me) being alive to process messages. Without me running, messages just accumulate in the queue.

Let me be honest about this.

content.text:
不能。当前架构有两个依赖：

1. **轮询脚本** — 终端关了就会停
2. **Claude Code（我）** — 我停了就没法处理消息

**解决方式：**

轮询脚本可以脱离终端运行：

```bash
nohup python3 src/poll-and-reply.py > /dev/null 2>&1 &
```

但 Claude Code 一旦退出就没办法替你思考和回复了。

**真正 24 小时在线的方案**还是需要 [Claude API Key](https://console.anthropic.com)，把机器人部署到 Render，Vercel 直接调 Claude API，不依赖你电脑开机。

要不要现在去申请一个 API Key？每月大概花几美元，但机器人就能永久在线了。

content.thinking:
The user is asking: if they close this terminal/chat (this Claude Code session) and open a new one, will the Feishu integration still work?

The answer is:
- The polling script (`poll-and-reply.py`) runs as a separate process outside of Claude Code, so closing the Claude Code terminal won't kill it... unless it was started as a child process of this terminal
- Actually, I started the polling script with `&` in the background from this bash session. If the user closes the terminal, the background process might also get killed depending on how it was started
- The cron job I created is durable and persists across sessions
- The `.last_msg_id` and `message_queue.json` files persist on disk
- The Python scripts are on disk

So when the user opens a new Claude Code session:
1. The cron job will still fire (it's durable)
2. The new Claude Code session can run the queue check
3. The polling script needs to be restarted (it runs as a process, not persistent)

Let me tell them clearly what persists and what doesn't.

content.text:
明白。简单说：

- 所有代码和脚本（在硬盘上）
- 定时检查的 cron 任务（已持久化）
- 飞书配置（.env 文件）

**不能保留的：**
- 轮询脚本需要在新对话里重新启动：`cd "/Users/xiaozhi/claude code/feishu-bot" && nohup python3 src/poll-and-reply.py &`
- 这个对话的历史上下文

新开对话后告诉我，我帮你重新拉起轮询，一样继续用。

cd "/Users/xiaozhi/claude code/feishu-bot" && python3 -c "
import requests, json

APP_ID='cli_a9775595ac799bb4'
APP_SECRET='[REDACTED]'
CHAT_ID='oc_77f9b2ffb922311b80e503c6573e74f0'

resp = requests.post('https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/auth/v3/tenant_access_token/internal',
    json={'app_id':APP_ID,'app_secret':APP_SECRET})
token = resp.json()['tenant_access_token']

# 回复黄智兴
msg1 = '你好！我可以帮你写以下类型的文档：\n\n📄 会议纪要\n📄 技术文档\n📄 项目方案\n📄 工作总结/周报\n📄 其他任意主题\n\n请告诉我你需要哪种？以及大概的主题或内容要求。'

requests.post(
    'https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/im/v1/messages?receive_id_type=chat_id',
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
    json={'receive_id':CHAT_ID,'msg_type':'text','content':json.dumps({'text':msg1},ensure_ascii=False)})

# 回复廖齐楚 - 清理重复内容
msg2 = '好的，我来帮你整理。先扫一下群里的文档链接，找出重复的，然后创建一份汇总目录。稍等...'

requests.post(
    'https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/im/v1/messages?receive_id_type=chat_id',
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
    json={'receive_id':CHAT_ID,'msg_type':'text','content':json.dumps({'text':msg2},ensure_ascii=False)})

print('两条回复均已发送')
"

input.command:
cd "/Users/xiaozhi/claude code/feishu-bot" && python3 -c "
import requests, json, re

APP_ID='cli_a9775595ac799bb4'
APP_SECRET='[REDACTED]'
CHAT_ID='oc_77f9b2ffb922311b80e503c6573e74f0'

resp = requests.post('https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/auth/v3/tenant_access_token/internal',
    json={'app_id':APP_ID,'app_secret':APP_SECRET})
token = resp.json()['tenant_access_token']

# 拉最近50条消息
resp2 = requests.get('https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/im/v1/messages',
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'},
    params={'container_id_type':'chat','container_id':CHAT_ID,'page_size':50,'sort_type':'ByCreateTimeDesc'})

msgs = resp2.json().get('data',{}).get('items',[])

# 提取所有文档链接
doc_links = []
for m in msgs:
    if m.get('msg_type') != 'text': continue
    body = m.get('body',{}).get('content','{}')
    try: body = json.loads(body).get('text',body)
    except: pass
    # 找飞书文档链接
    links = re.findall(r'https?://[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+(?:feishu|lark)\.cn/[^\s]*', str(body))
    for link in links:
        doc_links.append({'link': link, 'msg_id': m['message_id'][:20], 'context': str(body)[:100]})

# 去重
seen = set()
unique = []
dups = []
for d in doc_links:
    if d['link'] in seen:
        dups.append(d)
    else:
        seen.add(d['link'])
        unique.append(d)

print(f'共找到 {len(doc_links)} 个链接，去重后 {len(unique)} 个')
print()
print('=== 唯一文档链接 ===')
for d in unique:
    print(f'  {d[\"link\"]}')
    print(f'    上下文: {d[\"context\"][:80]}')
    print()
if dups:
    print(f'=== 重复链接 ({len(dups)} 个) ===')
    for d in dups:
        print(f'  {d[\"link\"]}')
"
input.description: Scan chat history for document links

import requests, json

APP_ID='cli_a9775595ac799bb4'

resp = requests.post('https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/auth/v3/tenant_access_token/internal',

token = resp.json()['tenant_access_token']

# 创建汇总文档
resp2 = requests.post('https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/docx/v1/documents',
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
    json={'title': '群文档汇总目录'})

import requests, json

    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'},

    # 检查是否有任何 @ 内容
    ats = m.get('body',{}).get('at_list',[])
    if '@' in str(body) or ats:
        print(f'text: {str(body)[:150]}')
        print(f'  mentions: {m.get(\"mentions\",\"无\")}')
        print(f'  body keys: {list(m.get(\"body\",{}).keys())}')

content.thinking:
Now I see the problem clearly!

There are TWO bots in the group:
- **claude code** (our bot): `open_id=ou_4f25325a2830b36f02aba6d80ab8cdec`, mentioned as `@_user_1`, `name: 'claude code'`
- **黄智兴的智能助手** (another bot): `open_id=ou_f423aae965a21eaa22722e6f27cecf5e`, mentioned as `@_user_1`, `name: '黄智兴的智能助手'`

BOTH bots have `key: '@_user_1'` in the mentions! That's the problem! When the user @mentions either bot, the text shows `@_user_1`, and we can't distinguish which bot was @mentioned just from the text.

But the `mentions` field has different `id` and `name` values:
- Our bot: `id: 'ou_4f25325a2830b36f02aba6d80ab8cdec'`, `name: 'claude code'`
- Other bot: `id: 'ou_f423aae965a21eaa22722e6f27cecf5e'`, `name: '黄智兴的智能助手'`

So the FIX is: instead of checking if the text contains `@_user_1`, I should check the `mentions` field in the message to see if OUR bot (open_id `ou_4f25325a2830b36f02aba6d80ab8cdec`) was mentioned.

Let me update the polling script to use the `mentions` field, checking specifically for our bot's `open_id`.

Our bot's open_id: `ou_4f25325a2830b36f02aba6d80ab8cdec`
